resources.string:
Netty Proxy is a high-performance HTTP/HTTPS proxy server for Android devices.

Developer:
• Name: OMAR HAIDAR
• Telegram: @OMAR_HAIDAR_0
• GitHub: github.com/omar-haidar/Android-Netty-Proxy

Features:
• HTTP & HTTPS proxy support (CONNECT method)
• Auto-start on device boot
• Foreground service for reliable background operation
• Built with Netty framework for high concurrency
• Lightweight and efficient

How it works:
This app turns your Android device into a proxy server, allowing other devices on the same network to browse the internet through your device. Perfect for networks where only one device has internet access.

Technical Details:
• Built with: Java, Netty 4.1
• Proxy port: 8080 (configurable)
• Supports: HTTP, HTTPS (via CONNECT)

License:
This project is open-source and available under the MIT License.

Thank you for using Netty Proxy!
